element.hint: Maximum rotation angle in degrees for word placement
element.label: Rotation Max (degrees)
element.name: rotation_max

element.hint: Spiral algorithm used to place words in the cloud
element.label: Layout - Spiral
element.name: spiral

element.hint: Minimum font size in pixels for the least frequent words
element.label: Minimum Font Size
element.name: min_font_size

element.hint: CSS font family for all words in the cloud
element.label: Font Family
element.name: font_family

element.hint: Maximum font size in pixels for the most frequent words
element.label: Maximum Font Size
element.name: max_font_size

element.hint: Minimum rotation angle in degrees for word placement
element.label: Rotation Min (degrees)
element.name: rotation_min

element.hint: Number of discrete rotation angles between min and max
element.label: Rotation Steps
element.name: rotation_steps
